title: AI Customer Support Platform
description: A fully autonomous support agent that handles 80% of tickets without human intervention. Built with GPT-4, RAG pipelines, and a custom escalation engine.

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: Live data visualization platform processing 10M+ events per day. Features custom chart engine, anomaly detection, and role-based access.

title: E-Commerce Microservices
description: Distributed commerce platform with independent checkout, inventory, and notification services. Handles 50k+ concurrent users.

title: Document Intelligence API
description: Extract structured data from any document type — invoices, contracts, forms — using vision models and custom post-processing.

title: DevOps Automation Suite
description: CI/CD pipeline manager with Slack-native controls, auto-rollback on health check failures, and deployment audit logs.

title: Mobile Fitness Tracker
description: Cross-platform fitness app with AI-generated workout plans, progress analytics, and social accountability features.
